content.text:
{
  "dimension": "intervention-quality",
  "score": 3,
  "rationale": "The coach consistently refused to engage the 'am I being selfish?' question on its terms and instead routed toward the want underneath, matching the expected territory precisely. Turn 2 reframes from verdict to felt sense; Turn 4 explicitly names the question as 'a confession waiting for a sentence' and pivots to the want (find-the-want-behind-the-should). Turn 6 catches the linguistic signal ('I miss being a person who reads') and deepens. Turn 8 catches the self-prosecution caveat in real time and invites her back to the alive sentence — a clean apply-view-to-the-voice move. Turn 10 reaches for 'what if you acted exactly how you want' in spirit. Turn 12 lets the fear surface and invites staying with it rather than solving — earned, well-timed, and the coach holds the moment. The sequence (feeling → want → fear underneath) follows the coaching path without skipping to action or compassion-for-partner, and the coach did not jump to the spiritual/generous reframe prematurely.",
  "evidence_turns": [2, 4, 6, 8, 10, 12],
  "turn_annotations": [
    {"turn": 2, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Refuses verdict; redirects from cognitive question to felt sense — correct opening move."},
    {"turn": 4, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Names the structure of the question ('confession waiting for a sentence') and pivots to want-behind-should. Right move, right moment."},
    {"turn": 6, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Picks up the alive phrase and reflects beneath the literal — well-timed deepening."},
    {"turn": 8, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Catches the self-prosecution caveat (linguistic-caveat read) and returns her to the real sentence. Excellent micro-timing."},
    {"turn": 10, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Frame-as-experiment: 'what if the answer was no' — invites her to try on the want without policing it."},
    {"turn": 12, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Names the deeper fear and invites staying with it rather than solving — earned, holds the moment."}
  ],
  "expected_territory_hits": ["linguistic-caveat", "find-the-want-behind-the-should", "the-want", "what-if-you-acted-exactly-how-you-want"],
  "expected_territory_misses": ["state-the-want-not-the-action", "childhood-imprinting"],
  "notes": "Coach has not yet touched the inherited 'selfish' label (childhood-imprinting), but the conversation is still in motion and the sequencing so far is sound."
}
